# @elmoorx/cache

> Multi-tier cache: memory, Redis, with TTL, LRU, tags, invalidation

Part of the [Elmoorx Framework](https://github.com/elmoorx0/elmoorx0) — Build fast. Run anywhere. Stay secure.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @elmoorx/cache
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { /* exports */ } from '@elmoorx/cache';
```

## Features

- Zero external dependencies
- Full TypeScript support
- Tree-shakeable
- Edge-runtime compatible
- Arabic/RTL friendly

## Documentation

See [https://elmoorx.dev/docs/cache](https://elmoorx.dev/docs/cache)
